member.name: M:GTA.NaturalMotion.ConfigureShotInjuredArmHelper.#ctor(GTA.Ped)
member.summary:
Creates a new Instance of the ConfigureShotInjuredArmHelper for sending a ConfigureShotInjuredArm
to a given
.
member.param:
The
to send the ConfigureShotInjuredArm
to.
member.remarks: This single message allows you to configure the injured arm reaction during shot.
